ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wines" (
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wine variety */,
  "wine_name" TEXT /* Name of the wine variety */,
  "wine_type" TEXT /* Type of wine (e.g., red, white, sparkling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the wine variety */,
  "vineyard" TEXT /* Vineyard where the wine was produced */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the wine was produced */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the wine was produced */,
  "grape_variety" TEXT /* Grape variety used to produce the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_vineyard FOREIGN KEY ("vineyard") REFERENCES vineyards ("vineyard_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wines_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "chemical_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical property */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine variety the property belongs to */,
  "fixed_acidity" REAL /* Fixed acidity of the wine */,
  "volatile_acidity" REAL /* Volatile acidity of the wine */,
  "citric_acid" REAL /* Citric acid content of the wine */,
  "residual_sugar" REAL /* Residual sugar content of the wine */,
  "chlorides" REAL /* Chloride content of the wine */,
  "free_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Free sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "total_sulfur_dioxide" REAL /* Total sulfur dioxide content of the wine */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the wine */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the wine */,
  "sulphates" REAL /* Sulphate content of the wine */,
  "alcohol" REAL /* Alcohol content of the wine */,
  "tannins" REAL /* Tannin content of the wine */,
  "color_intensity" REAL /* Color intensity of the wine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chemical_properties_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "wine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine variety the batch belongs to */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was produced */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Storage conditions for the batch */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Tasting notes for the batch */,
  "bottling_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was bottled */,
  "label_design" TEXT /* Label design for the batch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_wine_id FOREIGN KEY ("wine_id") REFERENCES wines ("wine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality score */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the score belongs to */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score (e.g., 1-10) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality score */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the quality score was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_scores_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the batch the certificate belongs to */,
  "certificate_number" TEXT /* Certificate number */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Issue date of the certificate */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the certificate */,
  "issuing_organization" TEXT /* Organization that issued the certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certificates_batch_id FOREIGN KEY ("batch_id") REFERENCES batches ("batch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., winemaker, quality control, management) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource that the permission applies to (e.g., wine, batch, certificate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity performed (e.g., login, logout, edit batch) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the report generation */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vineyards" (
  "vineyard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vineyard */,
  "vineyard_name" TEXT /* Name of the vineyard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the vineyard is located in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vineyard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vineyards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
